name: Great Hall
description:
This large Public Scening Hall is a cavernous room with a vaulted ceiling
upon which a fresco depicts angels, cherubs and robed figures in postures of
ecstacy as they  dispense or receive pleasure.  A blazing fireplace at one
end of the room is flanked by chairs in which slaves writhe in pleasure,
impaled on their masters' laps.  In the centre of the room is a pole to
which slaves may be tethered as they submit to exquisite punishment.  A basket
holding riding crops, whips, switches and paddles is near at hand.  At the
far end of the room is a bed-sized platform between two tall columns.  On
the platform, a slave is lying on her back, her arms chained to rings set in
the columns.  Her legs are bent back and suspended in  midair by a chain
fastened to a hook in the ceiling, awaiting her Master.
